ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., in-person, online, hybrid) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, announcement) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)
